seoTitle: Maimuru vs Main Arm — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Maimuru and Main Arm. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Maimuru vs Main Arm: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Maimuru and Main Arm.
heading: Maimuru vs Main Arm — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Maimuru, New South Wales and Main Arm, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Maimuru has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Main Arm (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Maimuru or Main Arm safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Maimuru has a flood risk score of 43/100, while Main Arm scores 60/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Maimuru scores 33/100 for bushfire risk. Main Arm scores 26/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Maimuru or Main Arm?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Maimuru has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.13% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
